privacy.dataSummaryDesc: Your account stores profile information, workout history, nutrition logs, body weight records, and check-in data. All data is protected with row-level security.

privacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicyPage.s1Intro: We collect the following information when you use La Fuerza:
privacyPolicyPage.s1a: Account Information: Email address, display name, and profile photo
privacyPolicyPage.s1b: Health & Fitness Data: Workout logs, body weight, nutrition logs, step counts, sleep data, and cardio logs
privacyPolicyPage.s1c: Usage Data: Check-ins, training preferences, and onboarding responses
privacyPolicyPage.s1d: Device Data: Device type and app preferences (theme, notification settings)
privacyPolicyPage.s2a: Provide and improve the coaching experience
privacyPolicyPage.s2b: Share your progress data with your assigned coach
privacyPolicyPage.s2c: Send workout and nutrition reminders (with your consent)
privacyPolicyPage.s3a: Your fitness data is shared only with your assigned coach
privacyPolicyPage.s3b: We do not sell your personal data to third parties
privacyPolicyPage.s3c: We do not use your data for advertising
privacyPolicyPage.s3d: We may use anonymized, aggregated data for service improvement
privacyPolicyPage.s4Body: Your data is stored securely in encrypted cloud databases with row-level security policies. Access is restricted to your account and your assigned coach. All data transfers use TLS encryption.
privacyPolicyPage.s5a: Access: Export all your data at any time from Privacy & Security settings
privacyPolicyPage.s5b: Delete: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
privacyPolicyPage.s5c: Correct: Update your profile information at any time
privacyPolicyPage.s5d: Withdraw consent: Disable notifications or revoke permissions
privacyPolicyPage.s6Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all personal data is permanently removed from our systems. Anonymized aggregate data may be retained for analytics.
privacyPolicyPage.s7Body: La Fuerza is not intended for users under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacyPolicyPage.s8Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes through the app or via email.
privacyPolicyPage.s9Body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or your data, please contact us through the app's support channels.

tosPage.title: Terms of Service
tosPage.s1Body: By accessing or using La Fuerza ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the App.
tosPage.s2Body: La Fuerza is a personal training companion app that allows personal trainers to manage their clients' workout programs, nutrition plans, and track progress. The App provides tools for workout logging, meal tracking, progress monitoring, and coach-client communication.
tosPage.s3a: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account
tosPage.s3b: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials
tosPage.s3c: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
tosPage.s3d: You must be at least 16 years of age to use this App
tosPage.s4a: Use the App for any unlawful purpose
tosPage.s4b: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the App
tosPage.s4c: Interfere with or disrupt the App's functionality
tosPage.s4e: Share your account credentials with others
tosPage.s5Body: The App provides fitness and nutrition tracking tools. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before starting any exercise or nutrition program. The App and its operators are not liable for any injuries, health issues, or adverse effects resulting from following workout plans or nutrition guidance provided through the App.
tosPage.s6Body: All content, features, and functionality of the App are owned by the App operator. Workout plans and recipes created by coaches remain their intellectual property. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any content without permission.
tosPage.s7Body: Your use of the App is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the App, you consent to the collection and use of information as described in the Privacy Policy. Your fitness data is shared only with your assigned coach.
tosPage.s8Body: You may delete your account at any time through the Privacy & Security settings. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Upon deletion, all your personal data will be permanently removed.
tosPage.s9Body: The App is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the App. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid for the App, if any.
tosPage.s10Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We will notify you of significant changes through the App.
tosPage.s11Body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the App's support channels.
